title: Replace topbar dropdowns with collapsible left sidebar
author: optimize-avo
body:
Topbar had grown to 4 links + 8 dropdown menus (~59 destinations) in a 54px bar. Replaced with a left Sidebar reorganized into 6 groups (Operate, Analyze, Services, Tools, Configure, Admin) + pinned Docs, with an icon-rail <-> expanded collapse mode persisted to localStorage.

PipelineMonitor moved from a left in-flow panel to the right: unpinned overlay drawer (auto-closes on navigation) or pinned in-flow column. Topbar slimmed to brand + LiveTicker + monitor toggle + UserMenu.

- New src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx
- Removed src/components/layout/TopNav.tsx (superseded)
- PageShell, PipelineMonitor, ui.store updated
- CLAUDE.md nav rule corrected (sidebar is now canonical)
- v2.174.0 -> v2.175.0

commits.message: feat: replace topbar dropdowns with collapsible left sidebar
feat: implement atomic credit reservation ledger for vs probes to ensure billing concurrency safety

title: Explain why + effect on AS measurement partial ribbon
author: optimize-avo
body:
The degraded ("AS measurement partial") health ribbon showed only a title with no explanation, since the success path nulls last_failure_hint. Clients had no way to know why the measurement was partial or what it means.

- DomainHealthRibbon: when no backend hint is present, fall back to a localized run_state.{state}.body explaining the cause and the effect.
- Add run_state.degraded.body to all 5 locales (en/id/ja/ko/zh-TW): "This site blocks automated crawlers, so the score was measured through a limited fallback. The score is still valid, but its accuracy may be slightly reduced."

Hint-first ordering preserved, so blocked/failed states still show their backend-supplied hints unchanged.

commits.message: feat(domain): explain why + effect on AS measurement partial ribbon

title: Skip verification email during self-registration
author: davidsurosegoro
